name: essay-humanize-iterator
tagline: Iteratively refine essays to reduce AI-detection false positives by aligning style with human-writer norms
description: A closed-loop rewriting skill that measures 24 known AI stylistic patterns (Wikipedia Signs of AI writing), syntactic complexity (MDD/ADD via dependency parsing), and semantic density (TTR, content-word ratio), then iteratively refines the essay with targeted feedback until all metrics fall within human-writer baselines (CAWSE/LOCNESS corpus). Designed to minimize unnecessary false positives from oversensitive AI detectors by improving writing naturalness. Outputs the polished essay plus an iteration-by-iteration metrics report.
